title: SENENQU 6 Pack 7 x 14cm Small Glass Vases for Flowers, Hyacinth Flower Vase, Clear Bud Vase Decorative Vases for Table Decoration Wedding Party Birthday Baby Shower
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: Each package includes 6 pack of glass vase and 6 rolls of hemp rope. The size of hyacinth flower vase is 7 x 4 x 13.7cm / 2.7 x 1.57 x 5.39 inch (Top Dia. x Base Dia. x H), and the length of each rope is 4m / 13ft, suitable for meeting your daily use.

PREMIUM MATERIAL: Made of high quality glass material, the clear bud vase is sturdy and lightweight, which could be used for a long time. With elegant and modern style, the small decorative vase highlight the bloom in the house.

WIDE MOUTH DESIGN: The wide mouth of clear vase is rolled and smooth with no burr, preventing your hand from scratching. Came with decorating hemp rope, the flower vase looks natural and rustic. The thickened bottom of decorative vase keeps vase on the table stably.

SUITABLE FOR DISPLAY: The glass flower vase is suitable for short stem flowers, decorating your house and displaying for guests. You could give hyacinth flower vases to your friends as gifts in the party and birthday.

WIDE APPLICATIONS: The clear flower vases could be used for many occasions, such as living room, bedroom, office, restaurant and reception. The decorative bud vase is ideal for wedding, festival and anniversary, giving everyone a refresh feeling.
